name: overdrive_intel_feed
description: Query the Claude Code ecosystem intelligence feed for news about tools, MCP servers, model updates, and ecosystem developments. Returns a JSON array of items ranked by recency and significance.

type.description: Filter by item type. 'tool' = Claude Code extensions and utilities; 'model' = Claude model updates; 'integration' = MCP servers and third-party integrations; 'ecosystem' = broader news.

significance.description: Filter by editorial significance rating. Omit to return all significance levels.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.

query.description: Optional keyword or phrase to search within item titles and summaries.

name: overdrive_intel_search
description: Semantic search across the Claude Code ecosystem intelligence feed. Use when the user asks about a specific topic, tool name, or concept rather than browsing the latest items.

query.description: Natural language query or keyword phrase to search for.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.
